items.summary: In April 2026, Tradr ETFs launched two new Cboe-listed short leveraged funds offering two times the inverse daily performance of Lumentum Holdings and Sandisk, adding fresh tools for traders to express bearish single-stock views without using margin or options. These launches arrived just as Lumentum drew heightened attention for its role in AI-focused optical infrastructure, growing institutional ownership, and contrasting signals from insider selling and valuation models. Now we’ll examine...
